name: input-autocomplete
description: Inline autocomplete for the chat input. Mirrors the auto-title pattern: single-shot OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions call, cheap model, returns a 1-line continuation. Routes (/v1/input-autocomplete/suggest, /v1/input-autocomplete/config) mount on ctx.app. Disabled by default; user opts in via the Autocomplete prefs tab.
